_note: First real DCIK eval PoC. EXPLORATORY: single topic, single blind scorer (Codex), and the three arms were author-generated in one session (self-authorship confound). Directional only — not confirmatory. Scorer was blind to arm (anonymized A/B/C, shuffled); mapping A=LITE B=FULL C=BASELINE was withheld from the scorer.

topics.gold_provenance: Gold set g1-g8 frozen in eval/topics/sqlite-vs-postgres.md before any arm was generated; derived from database-engineering fundamentals, not from any DCIK run.
